component.name: UniChat
component.summary: Unified desktop chat for Twitch, Kick, YouTube, and more

description.p: UniChat is a Tauri desktop app that aggregates live chat from multiple streaming platforms in one place, with mixed and split views, replies, and a focused developer workflow.
Release version 0.1.6 with overlay improvements and code cleanup:

ul.li: Added OverlayEventService for unified event sending to overlay (chat messages, widget config, channel updates, system events)
Extended OverlaySourceBridgeService with sendEvent method for custom payloads
Removed mockWidgets dependency from DashboardStateService, using inline default widget configuration
Removed dashboard mock data file

description.p: Release version 0.1.5 with Tauri API and build improvements:

ul.li: Enabled global Tauri API and relaxed CSP for better integration
Reordered CSS imports and added global styles for consistency
Simplified font imports and added Roboto font
Updated dependencies and moved dev-only packages to devDependencies
Configured Angular schematics and production build settings

description.p: Release version 0.1.4 with refactored channel avatar system:

ul.li: Extracted ChannelAvatarService for centralized channel avatar management across all views
Refactored chat-message-card and dashboard feed components to use new avatar service
Refactored overlay and settings views to use centralized avatar service
Improved channel image preloading in ChatListService for faster initial render
Fixed updateChannelAccount to properly pass username for account linking
Updated Tailwind variant syntax for Flowbite integration

description.p: Release version 0.1.3 with build configuration and overlay fixes:

ul.li: Simplified Angular build configuration by changing inlineStyleLanguage from scss to css
Removed custom optimization settings for production build to fix CSS loading issues
Disabled inlineCritical CSS to ensure styles load properly
Added devtools: true in tauri.conf.json for development debugging
Restructured overlay window configuration: moved all desktop-only builder methods (inner_size, resizable, decorations, always_on_top, visible) under #[cfg(desktop)] to fix Android build
Fixed Android build error: conditionally applied desktop-only window methods (set_focus, title) with #[cfg(desktop)] to support mobile platforms

description.p: Release version 0.1.1 with improvements and bug fixes:

ul.li: Build system improvements: migrated from npm to bun for faster dependency management
Fixed circular dependency issue in ChatListService by using Injector pattern
Removed unnecessary Rust dependencies (OpenSSL, native-tls, hyper-tls) reducing binary size
Android build now uses rustls-tls instead of native-tls for better cross-compilation
Added OpenSSL environment variables for Android CI builds
Enabled production mode to reduce console output in production builds
Fixed macOS build error by removing unsupported .transparent() method on WebviewWindowBuilder

description.p: Initial public release of UniChat — a unified desktop chat client for Twitch, Kick, and YouTube live chat.

ul.li: Multi-platform support: Twitch, Kick, and YouTube live chat in one place
Mixed and split feed views for monitoring multiple channels simultaneously
OAuth authentication with automatic token refresh and reconnection
Overlay system for streaming chat widgets with configurable channels
Real-time message delivery with rich text formatting
Dark and light theme support
Global message caching with intelligent memory management
Channel avatar fetching from platform APIs
Flatpak packaging for Linux distribution
